message:
chore: Update workspace dependencies and beads tracking

- Update Cargo.lock with latest dependency resolutions
- Update pt-redact Cargo.toml configuration
- Sync beads issue tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
